verbGlossary.ORIGINATES IN: {source} is first created in {target}, typically as an editable draft before formal submission to the jurisdiction.
verbGlossary.FILED AT: {source} is formally submitted to the authority having jurisdiction at {target}, starting the official review clock.
verbGlossary.AWAITS: {source} is queued and waiting for jurisdictional action at {target}; no construction activity may proceed until someone acts.
verbGlossary.ISSUED UPON: {source} is formally issued and construction work is authorized to begin when {target} is reached.
verbGlossary.DENIED AT: {source} is rejected by the reviewing authority at {target}, requiring correction and resubmission.
verbGlossary.ROUTES THROUGH: {source} passes through {target} pattern or approval chain as part of its multi-department review process.
verbGlossary.SUSPENDED AT: {source} is placed on hold at {target}, halting authorized work until the hold condition is resolved.
verbGlossary.FOLLOWS: {source} or inspection adheres to this standard {target} pattern from submission through final disposition.
verbGlossary.RESUBMITTED VIA: {source} is revised and sent back through this resubmission {target} after receiving correction comments.
verbGlossary.CLEARED UPON: {source}is granted and the compliance hold is removed when {target} is reached.
verbGlossary.GRANTED UPON: {source}is formally granted by the reviewing body when {target} is reached.
verbGlossary.HEARD DURING: {source}is presented to and deliberated by the review board during {target}.
verbGlossary.CONDUCTED DURING: {source}plan review or regulatory examination is actively performed during {target}.
verbGlossary.CONDITIONED AT: {source} or certificate is approved with specific conditions or stipulations noted at {target}.
verbGlossary.PASSES AT: {source}inspected work meets code requirements and receives a passing disposition at this field {target}.
verbGlossary.STAGED AT: {source}inspection item is prepared and queued at {target}, awaiting the inspector's arrival and examination.
verbGlossary.DOCUMENTED VIA: {source}testing or inspection results are formally recorded through {target} response mechanism.
verbGlossary.FINALIZES AT: {source} reaches its terminal status, formally authorizing building occupancy and completing {target} lifecycle.
verbGlossary.CLOSES AT: {source} is closed at this terminal {target}, indicating all required work and inspections are complete.
verbGlossary.INITIATES AT: {source}is first filed and opened at {target}, triggering required compliance tracking.
verbGlossary.ENFORCED UPON: {source}plan becomes binding and enforceable on the jobsite when {target} is reached.
verbGlossary.ASSIGNED VIA: {source}inspection or review task is routed to the responsible party through {target}.
verbGlossary.MAPPED VIA: {source} current position in its regulatory lifecycle is tracked through this mapped {target} representation.
verbGlossary.MEASURED BY: {source} or inspection metric is quantified using {target} performance measure.
verbGlossary.BENCHMARKED AGAINST: {source}inspection pass rate is compared against this first-pass {target} metric to evaluate field readiness.
verbGlossary.TRACKED BY: {source} metric is monitored over time using {target} KPI.
verbGlossary.BOUND BY: {source}is constrained by {target} component, such as an expiration or conversion deadline.
